MR. PAUL EPSTEIN CALLED DEPT.#1. HE CLAIMED THE ATTY. OF RECORD (DENNIS MILLER) HAD LEFT HIS FIRM AND SHOULD NO LONGER BE LISTED IN THE SYSTEM. HE ALSO SAID HE HAD CALLED THE COURT SEVERAL TIMES TO CHANGE THE SUITE NUMBER ON HIS ADDRESS IN THE SYSTEM AND IT HAD NEVER BEEN DONE; DEPT. 1 UPDATED THE ADDRESS BUT LEFT THE ATTORNEY NAME SINCE THERE WAS NO CHANGE OF ATTORNEY FILED.
